articles.title: Cardano (ADA) A Security? Price Collapses On SEC v. Binance Lawsuit
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) and the crypto market just took a punch from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The regulator filed a lawsuit against Binance and its CEO, Changpeng Zhao, contributing to the decline in prices across the nascent market. Related Reading: Shiba Inu (SHIB) Poised For Significant Breakout: Here’s What To Watch Out For Cardano (ADA) trades at $0.35 as of this writing,...

articles.title: SEC accuses Binance of lying to customers, operating in US illegally
articles.description: In a lawsuit filed Monday, the SEC alleges significant breaches of U.S. law by crypto giant Binance.

articles.title: Breaking: SEC Alleges Cardano (ADA), Solana (SOL) and Polygon (MATIC) Are Securities
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has categorised a host of popular cryptocurrencies as unregistered securities in its lawsuit against Binance

articles.title: Multichain Bridge Transactions Resume On Four Chains, MULTI Up 15%
articles.description: Summary: On-chain data showed that multichain transactions on Polygon, Avalanche, zkSync Era, and Kava networks resumed on Monday. Cross-chain services across 11 chains remain suspended as the team announced last month. Users first reported abnormal activity and stuck transactions on May 21, prompting exits from investors and ecosystem stakeholders in the following days. The MULTI token increased...

articles.title: Atomic Wallet hack losses reportedly top $35 million
articles.description: Crypto wallet maker Atomic Wallet reported a large-scale hack on Saturday, June 3, after receiving reports about compromised crypto wallets. … Continued
